title: phlegmariurus humbertii-henrici
intro: Phlegmariurus humbertii-henrici, a species of club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Phlegmariurus humbertii-henrici include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In terms of herbal preparations, it can be consumed as a tea or used in infusion, with some sources also recommending the use of the plant's rhizome in traditional remedies.
